short_description: Multiway calibration using U-PLS (unfolded) or N-PLS (CP-PLSR) with canonical residual correction.
long_description: Select U-PLS to unfold multiway X into 2D and run standard PLS, or N-PLS to run CP-PLSR directly on tensor X. Residual correction uses RBL (SVD) for nway_flag=2 and Tucker-based multilinear correction for nway_flag>=3.

layout.name: multiway_method
layout.label: Multiway Method
layout.tooltip: Choose U-PLS to unfold X and run standard PLS, or N-PLS to run CP-PLSR directly on multiway data.

layout.name: multilinear_rank
layout.label: Interferent Rank
layout.tooltip: Single interferent rank (Aint). Use 0 to disable correction; values >0 enable RBL/RTL correction.

layout.name: lod_distribution
layout.label: LOD Distribution
layout.tooltip: Distribution used to derive the LOD/LOQ confidence factor from confidence level.

layout.name: lod_confidence_level
layout.label: LOD Confidence Level
layout.tooltip: Confidence level used to derive LOD factor (one-sided alpha=beta) using Student's t with calibration dof. LOQ uses the same factor internally.

layout.name: cv_config
layout.label: CV Configuration
layout.tooltip: Routed from CV Configuration function; leave empty for single fit

sections.short_description: Sample-level calibration predictions and residuals, with cross-validation comparison.
Sample-level validation predictions and residuals.
Scatter plot of reference versus calibration and cross-validation predicted Y with a 1:1 diagonal.
Validation scatter of reference versus predicted Y with a 1:1 diagonal reference line.
Per-response R² and RMSE for calibration, cross-validation, and validation sets.
Prediction error per sample for calibration, cross-validation, and validation sets.
Per-fold RMSECV and R² from the cross-validation run.
RMSECV and R² per cross-validation fold.
Percentage of X and Y variance explained by each latent variable.

config.title: X and Y Explained Variance by LV

sections.short_description: Scree-style plot of X and Y variance explained per latent variable.

config.title: Analytical Figures of Merit per Validation Sample

sections.short_description: Reference and predicted concentrations with LOD, LOQ, sensitivity, and concentration SD per validation sample.
LOD and LOQ min/max bounds plotted across validation samples.

config.title: Sample Residual Norm Before / After Correction

sections.short_description: Sample residual norms before and after RBL/RTL correction.
Per-sample residual norm and standard deviation before and after RBL/RTL correction.
Pairwise scatter of calibration U-PLS LV scores; select the LV pair and response to plot.

config.title: X Loadings and Weights — LV Pair

sections.short_description: Pairwise scatter of X loadings and weights by LV; each point is a feature; shows structure across LV pairs.

config.title: X and Y Variance Explained by LV

sections.short_description: X and Y variance explained per LV for the selected response.

config.title: X Loadings and Weights by Feature

sections.short_description: X loadings and weights plotted against feature index; navigate by LV and response.
Pairwise scatter of calibration N-PLS LV scores; select the LV pair and response to plot.
N-PLS CP mode factor profiles for all LVs overlaid; each series is one LV; navigate by spatial mode and response.

config.title: X and Y Explained Variance by LV

sections.short_description: Scree-style plot of X and Y variance explained per latent variable.
Mode-resolved interferent factor profiles per validation sample; browse by sample and mode.
Second mode panel for side-by-side comparison; shares the sample selector with the left panel.
Ellipsoidal joint confidence region (EJCR) for OLS slope and intercept of calibration predictions. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased calibration.
Ellipsoidal joint confidence region (EJCR) for OLS slope and intercept of validation predictions. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased prediction.
